inputs.label: Ball Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the baseball in ounces. MLB regulations: 5 to 5.25 ounces.

inputs.label: Effective Bat Mass
inputs.businessContext: Effective mass of the bat at the impact point, typically less than total bat weight. Default is for a standard wood bat.

inputs.label: Pitch Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the pitched ball as it crosses the plate, in miles per hour.

inputs.label: Bat Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the bat's sweet spot at the moment of impact, in miles per hour.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Restitution
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of restitution between ball and bat, typically 0.5 to 0.55 for wood bats.
